headline: Is DRI Stock a Buy Now After Earnings Growth and Valuation Reset
summary: Darden combines earnings growth, cash returns and a lower valuation multiple, but estimate cuts and inflation keep investors weighing the stock's outlook.

headline: Darden Stock Outlook Centers on Growth Brands and Cost Risks
summary: DRI enters fiscal 2027 with growth from LongHorn, digital initiatives and new restaurants, while inflation and cautious spending test margins.

headline: Consumers keep splurging on steak for Fourth of July barbecues despite record prices
summary: Beef inflation is surging, yet shoppers aren't backing down. Retailers and restaurants say steak demand remains resilient. CNBC's Brandon Gomez has the latest.

raw.headline: Consumers keep splurging on steak for Fourth of July barbecues despite record prices
raw.summary: Beef inflation is surging, yet shoppers aren't backing down. Retailers and restaurants say steak demand remains resilient. CNBC's Brandon Gomez has the latest.

headline: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
summary: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.

raw.headline: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
raw.summary: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.

headline: Here's why beef prices keep rising, and why consumers keep buying
summary: Beef prices hit record highs earlier this year as the U.S. cattle herd shrinks. But despite the elevated costs, consumers are still buying beef and steak in particular as they celebrate summer holidays. They're seeking not only value but also quality.

raw.headline: Here's why beef prices keep rising, and why consumers keep buying
